top_signals.title: Coca-Cola says Fairlife ransomware attack halts US dairy production
top_signals.summary: The Coca-Cola Company disclosed today that a ransomware attack impacting its Fairlife dairy subsidiary has disrupted operations, temporarily suspending production of Fairlife products across the United States. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Royal Mint Trading Fund: framework document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the Royal Mint Trading Fund, the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ‘Blessed town’ on Venezuelan coast escapes quake damage
top_signals.summary: The sleep town of Anare's 4,000 or so residents felt the 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude tremors last month, but their hillside homes remained intact.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
